text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold Ship's angler spirit yearns for a
hundred-squid haul! She swears to battle to hold
the territory where two ocean currents meet.
Now, to the track.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold Ship is racing in the Arima Kinen! And, for
whatever reason, she's fired up to take on Eishin
Flash as an angler.
